metadata.methodology: Data from NHS Talking Therapies (formerly IAPT) monthly returns. Referrals = total referrals received. Starts = people who entered treatment. Completions = people completing a course of treatment (two or more sessions). Recovery rate = proportion of completers who moved from clinical caseness to below caseness on primary anxiety or depression measure.
knownIssues: 2020 data significantly affected by pandemic service closures and rapid pivot to digital delivery
Recovery rate calculation methodology changed slightly in 2020 — pre-2020 data may not be fully comparable
Provider-level variation in recovery rates (40%-75%) not visible in national aggregates
